embed.title: Help
embed.description: Type `{{prefix}}help <command>` for details on any of the commands below.

fields.name: Tracking commands
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help track` ‚Äî alerts for specific pokemon (IV, CP, PVP)
`{{prefix}}help raid` ‚Äî raid bosses at gyms
`{{prefix}}help egg` ‚Äî raid eggs before they hatch
`{{prefix}}help quest` ‚Äî field research tasks
`{{prefix}}help incident` ‚Äî Team Rocket, Kecleon, Showcases, gold stops
`{{prefix}}help lure` ‚Äî lure modules at pokestops
`{{prefix}}help nest` ‚Äî pokemon nest spawns
`{{prefix}}help gym` ‚Äî gym team changes and battles
`{{prefix}}help fort` ‚Äî pokestop/gym location updates
`{{prefix}}help maxbattle` ‚Äî dynamax/gigantamax raids

fields.name: Review and remove tracking
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help tracked` ‚Äî list everything you're tracking
`{{prefix}}help untrack` ‚Äî remove tracking entries
`{{prefix}}help script` ‚Äî export your tracking as commands

fields.name: Your account and alerts
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}help poracle` ‚Äî register (or re-enable) your account
`{{prefix}}help area` ‚Äî choose which areas to receive alerts for
`{{prefix}}help location` ‚Äî set your home/current location
`{{prefix}}help profile` ‚Äî multiple tracking profiles (home/work/weekend)
`{{prefix}}help language` ‚Äî change bot response language
`{{prefix}}help start` / `{{prefix}}help stop` ‚Äî pause or resume alerts
`{{prefix}}help unregister` ‚Äî delete your account and all tracking

fields.name: {{#if userIsAdmin}}Admin commands{{/if}}
fields.value:
{{#if userIsAdmin}}`{{prefix}}help enable` / `{{prefix}}help disable` ‚Äî manage other users
`{{prefix}}help broadcast` ‚Äî send a message to everyone
`{{prefix}}help userlist` ‚Äî list registered users
`{{prefix}}help community` ‚Äî area-security community membership{{/if}}

fields.name: Filter syntax (applies to most tracking commands)
fields.value: All filters use `key:value` form ‚Äî e.g. `iv:100`, `cp:2000-3000`, `level:25-35`, `d:500`. Ranges are written `low-high` and are always preferred over separate `miniv`/`maxiv` variants ‚Äî easier to read and easier to change. Use `everything` as the pokemon name to match all pokemon.
